title: synth_xilinx: error when synthesizing inout port with constant 1'bz driver
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Using the following verilog file:

```verilog :file: inout_z.v
module mod(a);
  inout a;
  assign a = 1'bz;
endmodule
```

On 1dbc70172, `yosys -p 'read_verilog inout_z.v; synth_xilinx'` fails with `ERROR: Output port mod.$iopadmap$mod.a.O (IBUF) is connected to constants: 1'z`.

## Expected behavior

The module gets synthesized as an (in)out buffer with constant low-impedance output.

## Actual behavior

Synthesis errors.

## Possibly related issues

#511, #665
